summary: Comprehensive testing of DC (Delivery Challan), MSP Payments, and Gunny Bags modules. All 27 backend API tests passed (CRUD, summary, exports). Frontend UI verified - tabs, sub-tabs, forms, expandable rows with deliveries all working. Fixed KMS year format inconsistency between App.js and DCTracker.jsx.

bugs_fixed.issue: CURRENT_KMS calculation used 2-digit year (2025-26) while App.js uses 4-digit year (2025-2026)
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed CURRENT_KMS calculation from `${y}-${(y+1)%100}` to `${y}-${y+1}` to match App.js format

dc_entries.crud: PASS - Create, Read, Delete DC entries
dc_entries.status_flow: PASS - pending -> partial -> completed based on deliveries
dc_entries.expandable_rows: PASS - Click DC row shows deliveries with Add Delivery button

dc_deliveries.cascade_delete: PASS - Deleting DC deletes its deliveries

msp_payments.crud: PASS - Create, Read, Delete MSP payments
msp_payments.dc_linking: PASS - MSP form has DC dropdown to link payment to DC
msp_payments.dc_number_resolve: PASS - GET returns payments with dc_number resolved
msp_payments.summary: PASS - Returns total_paid_amount, total_paid_qty, avg_rate, pending_payment_qty

gunny_bags.crud: PASS - Create, Read, Delete bag entries
gunny_bags.bag_types: PASS - new (govt) and old (market) types supported
gunny_bags.txn_types: PASS - in/out transactions with auto-calculated amount
gunny_bags.summary: PASS - Returns new/old bag balances and grand_total
gunny_bags.stock_cards: PASS - UI shows New (Govt Free) and Old (Market) bag cards

navigation.sub_tabs: PASS - 3 sub-tabs: DC/Delivery Challan, MSP Payments, Gunny Bags/बोरी

seed_data_creation: Created test DC (TEST-CORRECT-KMS) with delivery during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: DC, MSP, and Gunny Bag modules fully functional. KMS year filter applies - entries must match filters.kms_year. Previous test iterations covered CMR exports (13), Cash Book (14). All 3 new modules tested and working.
